channel.title: Jahrbücher für Nationalökonomie und Statistik
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Jahrbücher für Nationalökonomie und Statistik

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Johanna Garnitz, Annette von Maltzan, Klaus Wohlrabe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2025-frontmatter1-2

item.title: Editorial: Minimum Wages – Experiences of European Countries
item.description: Article by Johanna Garnitz, Annette von Maltzan, Klaus Wohlrabe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2024-0081

item.title: What Explains Differences in Minimum Wage Growth Between EU Member States?
item.description: Article by Johanna Garnitz, Annette von Maltzan, Klaus Wohlrabe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0039

item.title: The Netherlands’ Minimum Wage 1969–2022: Can We Learn from Decline?
item.description: Article by Johanna Garnitz, Annette von Maltzan, Klaus Wohlrabe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0036

item.title: The Minimum Wage in Greece: A Review of Institutional Features, Developments and Effects Between 1975 and 2023
item.description: Article by Johanna Garnitz, Annette von Maltzan, Klaus Wohlrabe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0041

item.title: The Minimum Wage in Germany: Institutional Setting and a Systematic Review of Key Findings
item.description: Article by Johanna Garnitz, Annette von Maltzan, Klaus Wohlrabe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0038

item.title: Effects of the German Minimum Wage on Wages and Household Income
item.description: Article by Johanna Garnitz, Annette von Maltzan, Klaus Wohlrabe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0024

item.title: Effects of the German Minimum Wage on Earnings and Working Time Using Establishment Data
item.description: Article by Johanna Garnitz, Annette von Maltzan, Klaus Wohlrabe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2024-0025

item.title: CILS4NEPS – Unlocking Research Potential Through More Participants, More Schools and International Comparison: Harmonized Data for Research on Education, School-to-work Transition and Integration Processes for Adolescents in Germany, the Netherlands, Sweden and England
item.description: Article by Johanna Garnitz, Annette von Maltzan, Klaus Wohlrabe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2024-0016

item.title: FamData: Database for Family Business Companies in Germany Covering Company Key Figures and Survey Data
item.description: Article by Johanna Garnitz, Annette von Maltzan, Klaus Wohlrabe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0056
